raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX Credit card dispute case number agXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX bank of XXXX credit card XXXX XXXX Citi Bank XXXX XXXX : {$2100.00} Dear Consumer Finance Bureau , I am writing to formally file a complaint regarding a recent transaction with Citi Bank .

To summarize the situation : I purchased a purse valued at {$2100.00}. When delivery was first attempted, I was not home to sign for the package, so it was returned to the warehouse. I then specifically instructed the merchant by phone not to resend the item, as I had already obtained the purse directly from their store.

Despite this, the merchant resent a new purse to my address without my permission. This time, they did not require a signature for a product of such high value and allegedly left it at my fence. I never received this second package. Given that my area is known for mail theft, a signature should have been mandatory for a delivery of this value.

I disputed the charge with my credit card company, Citi bank. Unfortunately, Citi bank has sided with the merchant after they provided what they claim is proof of delivery, without considering my repeated follow-ups and the lack of a proper signature confirmation.

In conclusion, I am requesting that either I receive a full refund of the {$2100.00} or that the product is resent with proper signature confirmation to ensure safe delivery.

I followed up with Citi bank multiple times they always said that the dispute is " in process '' and now they tell me it's closed and I can not reopen it. They didn't not update me properly or give me any chance to object, nor provided me with a detailed report of their investigation. 

Thank you for your attention to this matter.
